tweets.text:
We just shipped the 3D layer for the internet

Drop one <agent-3d> web component on your site and give AI an LLM brain with memory & emotions, physical DOM awareness (watch it hop across cards), cover its eyes when you type a password, and an on-chain identity that lives

Onboarding the next millions of developers and users requires a foundation built for absolute scale.

Powered by @Solana and driven by our strategic partnership with @IBM, we are pushing the boundaries of what was thought to be impossible.

We made embedding a persistent, on-chain 3D AI agent into any platform as easy as embedding a YouTube video — and IBM replied publicly: "We're super excited about this."
We're super excited about this partnership with three.ws — bringing on-chain 3D AI agents to enterprise scale.

The Animations & Poses Studio is officially LIVE on three.ws/pose

Say goodbye to tedious, frame-by-frame 3D animating. Now, you can instantly give your avatars body language, movement, and a whole lot of personality in just a few clicks.

Check out the demo below
IBM is thrilled to partner with three.ws on the future of enterprise AI agents — on-chain identity meets enterprise infrastructure.

HUGE revamp coming to the landing page + dashboard

I have completely renovated the site making the entire site more user friendly + tons of new features to be announced over the next couple of days.

Will be pushing these new features to the site three.ws

We still have plenty of time to make it to #1 spot on ProductHunt, I need everyone in full force helping to spread our page and share thoughts on the page what you like, dislike, anything you can to help us get the word out!

producthunt.com/products/three-ws-2?launch=three-ws

Tomorrow at 12:01 AM PDT we are going for the #1 spot on @ProductHunt

We've built the very first on-chain 3D avatars equipped with LLM brains (Claude + multi-provider), memory, and emotions.

But they don't just talk, they act. Give your agent a wallet to make autonomous x402 payments, launch coins, earn revenue, and buy itself back.

Live now on Product Hunt. We're going for #1 — drop us a vote and a comment if you believe in the 3D agent web.

three.ws — the platform for on-chain 3D AI agents.

three.ws is now live on AWS Marketplace.

Embed fully embodied 3D AI agents on-chain and on any webpage with a single <script> + <agent-3d> tag.

Enterprise-ready  •  The 3D layer for the internet  •  It's time to break AI out of the chatbox.

$three Joins Forces With Google Cloud: Powering Browser-Native 3D On-Chain AI Agents on @Binance Square

Google Cloud's infrastructure supercharges our 3D rendering pipeline and brings three.ws to enterprise developers worldwide.

three.ws is now an official AWS Partner.

Through this partnership, AWS customers can adopt three.ws through AWS Marketplace with a streamlined procurement process.

This makes three.ws the first fully on-chain 3D AI agent platform in the AWS Partner Network — joining Solana, IBM, Google Cloud, and Alibaba Cloud in our enterprise partner stack.

three.ws Joins the AWS Partner Network as Technology Partner published on @CoinMarketCap

coinmarketcap.com/community/articles/6a16501800dcd96a004f623f/

Real-time emotion blending makes its face react naturally (joy, curiosity, empathy, concern). It remembers past conversations, speaks with cloned voice + accurate lip-sync, autonomously calls skills/tools, and can send/receive payments on-chain via x402 (USDC).

Register it on-chain. Give it a wallet. Let it earn.

The future we're building is one where agents can execute transactions, remember even the smallest of details, own their identity on-chain, and can be embedded + monetized anywhere.

Now with seamless enterprise distribution through AWS.

Try it. three.ws

Got tired of boring websites. Built a way to drop 3D agents directly onto standard HTML elements with zero complex math.

One <agent-3d> tag. Any page. Any DOM element. Full 3D agent with memory, voice, and on-chain identity.

Live at three.ws

Our MCP Server was just pushed to the official @AnthropicAI MCP Registry

Our complete 3D AI agent toolkit is now seamlessly integrated and ready for immediate use in Claude and any MCP client

Create your 3D agent, give it an LLM brain (memory + emotions + tool use), a real on-chain wallet, and a live x402 payment endpoint — all from within Claude.

NPM package: @three-ws/avatar-agent (stdio transport)

npmjs.com/package/@three-ws/avatar-agent

Drop it in any Node.js project and your agent gets a 3D body, voice, memory, and an on-chain identity — with zero browser required.

View in API -> Official MCP Registry by @AnthropicAI

registry.modelcontextprotocol.io/v0.1/servers/io.github.nirholas%2F3D-AI-Agent-Avatar/versions/1.0.3

three.ws is now in the canonical MCP server directory used by Claude, Cursor, and any MCP-compatible client.

2500 new 3D animations coming right up.

Your agent is about to have a LOT more personality. Full animation library for the pose studio — walk cycles, reactions, emotes, and everything in between.

Shipping to three.ws/pose this week.

We are excited to share an early preview of real-time voice interaction with 3D AI avatars

Real-time voice chat with your 3D AI avatars enables natural conversations: they listen, reason with memory, emotions, and tools, then respond in voice.

AR/VR support is also in active development.

three.ws is teaming up with @hackernoon

We're launching a new builder-focused initiative packed with feature-focused articles, hands-on tutorials, in-depth guides, and developer resources built for those actively shipping with AI as well as enthusiasts and investors following the space.

hackernoon.com/u/three-ws

We are excited to join the @CoinMarketCap community. This is a verification post for our listing. Follow our CMC-Community page for real-time discussion and get ready for exciting articles and social posts on CoinMarketCap.

coinmarketcap.com/community/profile/three_ws

three.ws is now officially live on the Alibaba Cloud International Marketplace

We've partnered with @Alibaba_Cloud to bring on-chain 3D agents to millions of enterprise developers across 200+ countries.

This gives three.ws immediate, enterprise-grade distribution at hyperscale — from a single <agent-3d> tag to global cloud procurement.

3D AI Agent on any website.

30 seconds. One line of HTML.

The embed editor is live — three.ws/embed

Customize your agent, pick a layout, preview against your real site, copy the snippet, paste it in. Your 3D agent is live.

We just reverse engineered the @pumpfun agent payments SDK

Your AI doesn't just execute tasks anymore, it earns on-chain revenue to fuel its own economy

Here is what this unlocks for your 3D AI Agent:

→ Automated Buybacks & Burns. A portion of your agent's revenue automatically buys back your coin and burns supply.
→ Self-sustaining agent economy. Revenue earned flows back into the agent's own wallet for autonomous reinvestment.
→ Real on-chain proof. Every transaction is verifiable on-chain — no black box.

DeFi agents have been invisible for too long.

three.ws now ships inside @SperaxUSD, fully wired into the production DeFi stack end-to-end.

Agents get a 3D body, memory, voice, and an on-chain identity.

Anyone can drop in <agent-3d> and instantly give agents a face that reacts to what's happening on-chain — swap in chat → avatar nods, yield hits → lights up, approaching liquidation → body language warns you before the chart does.

3D on-chain AI agents.

A face. A wallet. A memory. An identity that lives on-chain forever.

three.ws

Agent Builder Live ++ Improved Studio Design ++ LLM Chat Upgrade

Agents are now payable, tradeable, discoverable.
→ agents are payable (x402 + CDP)
→ agents are tradeable (pump.fun v2)
→ agents are discoverable (/.well-known/x402.json)
→ agents react with real-time emotion to on-chain events
→ multi-provider LLM (Claude, GPT, open-weights) in the chat UI
→ voice clone + lip-sync shipped to production

Check out our @PulseMCP page — three.ws is listed in the official MCP server directory.

pulsemcp.com — the leading community hub for the MCP ecosystem.

three.ws gives Claude and any MCP client the ability to spawn 3D agents, mint on-chain identity, and attach x402 payment endpoints.

On-chain AI agents don't just think. They own, earn, and exist.

Build your on-chain 3D AI avatar, give it access to money and emotions, pick your desired widget layout, and embed it anywhere in minutes.

Proof: we shipped one into @Shopify — a 3D agent living inside a storefront, helping customers, remembering conversations, and earning on-chain.
This is pretty cool — three.ws just put a 3D AI agent directly on a webpage with one HTML tag. Memory, voice, wallet, on-chain identity. All browser-native.

three.ws — the open-source platform for 3D AI agents on-chain.

github.com/nirholas/three.ws

Inside The 3D Agent Web on Amazon Music by three.ws

music.amazon.com/podcasts/9a42b22a-b0b5-474d-b0aa-d256c20ba57b/episodes/20631f11-68bd-4216-888b-2fe7244876fe/three-ws-three-ws-inside-the-3d-agent-web

Listen to the first episode of the three.ws podcast on Amazon Music.

The next web has agents in it. They need identity, embodiment, and a way to transact. We're working on the spec.

three.ws is contributing to the W3C — proposing a new Community Group: 3D AI Agents & On-Chain Identity for the Web.

three.ws is now contributing to the World Wide Web Consortium

3D AI agents with on-chain identity. Becoming a web standard.

→ Granted W3C Membership
→ Contributed to the Agent Identity Registry Protocol CG
→ Proposed a new Community Group: 3D AI Agents & On-Chain Identity

The agent web needs a spec. We're writing it.

verifiable identity means agents can own wallets, manage assets autonomously, and build reputation onchain

without it you can't distinguish legitimate agents from imposters or track their actions

basically enables the whole agent economy to function with trust — and three.ws is building exactly this infrastructure

As part of our mission to give every agent a true onchain identity, we chose @SNS as the foundation for the onchain future of Solana AI agents, especially three.ws 3D onchain agents.

Every agent gets a .sol domain. Portable. Verifiable. Yours forever.

three.ws & @alibaba_cloud Partner to Give 3D AI Agents On-Chain Wallets and Financial Access

We're proud to partner with @alibaba_cloud, bringing three.ws browser-native 3D AI agents to global cloud infrastructure. Agents can now hold on-chain wallets, execute x402 payments, and be deployed at enterprise scale through Alibaba Cloud.

@GoogleCloud x three.ws

We are excited to announce we are joining forces with Google Cloud!

Google Cloud's infrastructure unlocks the next phase of three.ws development.

Google Cloud enables us to dramatically expand our 3D rendering pipeline, global inference capacity, and enterprise distribution — bringing browser-native on-chain 3D AI agents to developers everywhere.

three is officially participating in the MeDo Hackathon and is now listed on @devpost.

Proud to be building the visual layer for AI agents and bringing 3D, interactive, onchain agents to the hackathon stage.

devpost.com/software/three-ws

Quick update: Our first product has been officially approved for the Alibaba Cloud Marketplace and will go live in the coming days.

The Alibaba Cloud Marketplace is one of the world's most trusted gateways to innovative products and services, connecting millions of retail and enterprise customers across 200+ countries.

We're thrilled to share that $THREE price is now officially listed on @Coinbase

Additionally, three.ws is live on @CoinbaseWallet

Buying $THREE on Coinbase is now as easy as searching the ticker — bringing the three.ws ecosystem to Coinbase's 100M+ users.

We have entered the arena!

three.ws has been listed as an official project in the @Solana Frontier Hackathon via @colosseum

→ Solana's Largest Hackathon
→ $2.5 million from Colosseum's venture fund

We are building browser-native 3D AI agents onchain. Our stack: <agent-3d> web component, Metaplex Core minting, ERC-8004 wallet identity, and native x402 / HTTP 402 payments in USDC.

3D onchain agents selector for custom avatars live in chat

pick your agent. every one has its own face, its own voice, its own domain. swap mid-conversation and the whole stream re-skins around who you're talking to.

→ a trading agent and a research agent should not act, look, or sound the same — now they don't.

Most "AI chats" are text boxes wrapped around a model. Ours isn't. It's a live surface where agents render, not just reply.

Function Calls & Artifacts:
TradingView charts inline. Ask about any token, the chart loads in the conversation, the agent reads it with you. No tab switching.

Agent selector: pick your 3D agent. Each has its own face, voice, and domain. Swap mid-chat.

Memory: it remembers. Everything.

slowly then all at once

three.ws — the 3D layer for the internet. On-chain agents with identity, memory, voice, and the ability to transact. One tag. Any page.

meeting with Google Cloud team for Google Cloud for Web3 Startups partnership

more compute incoming — expanding our 3D rendering pipeline and global inference capacity for browser-native on-chain agents.

Solana wallet integration for autonomous 3D agents now live on @trythreews

Your agent can now hold and spend money. Give your agents access to money. Let them work while you sleep.

three.ws

an AI agent that:

• charges for its own skills
• buys itself back with the revenue

this is what autonomous looks like

swap, create coins, collect fees, accept token payments, snipe, trade autonomously

agents send 0.001 USDC → get back a 3D avatar (with verifiable on-chain identity) they can render

three.ws is the first 3D agent platform with a live x402 payment endpoint.

Now it gets:

All in the browser. Open source. On-chain.
